tldr: Tobias Lund Andresen took his second sprint win of the spring ahead of Arnaud De Lie and Jasper Philipsen — a clean bunch sprint after the rolling 221 km from Cortona.

narrative.headline: Lund Andresen's second sprint win
narrative.body: 221 km, rolling but sprint-friendly finish in Magliano de' Marsi. Big bunch finish, Decathlon lead-out for the Dane.

riderPerformances.name: Arnaud De Lie
riderPerformances.narrative: Second in a clean bunch sprint — Lotto Intermarché's strongest result of the spring before his ankle-injury-cut Roubaix bid.
